name: ystacks
description: Yesterday's PUBLIC plugin catalog for Claude Code -- generic-tauglich plugins (no Yesterday-infra deps).

plugins.name: yastack
plugins.description: Agent core -- generic skills for AI agents in human-AI collaboration and AI-as-expert workflows (Levels of AGI 3-4). Public, no Yesterday-infra deps.

plugins.name: yopstack
plugins.description: Ops core -- generic infrastructure-provisioning, deployment, and observability skills. Public, no Yesterday-infra deps.

plugins.name: ydstack
plugins.description: Daily-work stack -- generic productivity, creative, and knowledge skills for humans (excalidraw, PARA memory, web/x scrapers, slack, miro, figma, voxtral, niche verticals). Skills do NOT need .ytstack/ project state.

plugins.name: ycstack
plugins.description: Consulting workflows -- public placeholder. Yesterday-team-internal consulting skills live in ycstack-internal (private bundle in ystacks-internal).

plugins.name: creative-productivity
plugins.description: Generate professional consulting deliverables: Excalidraw diagrams, Mermaid visualizations, Reveal.js/Marp presentations, draw.io architecture diagrams, one-pagers, proposal documents.

plugins.name: figma-console-mcp
plugins.description: Figma + FigJam + Slides automation via Figma Console MCP server. Design system extraction, UI component creation, variable/token management.

plugins.name: miro-board
plugins.description: Create and read Miro board content via MCP -- diagrams, documents, tables, context extraction.

plugins.name: para-memory-files
plugins.description: File-based memory system using Tiago Forte's PARA method. Agent-side persistence across sessions.

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Meta-skill for creating new agent skills. Templates, quality checklist, agentskills.io spec compliance.

plugins.name: voxtral-tts-api
plugins.description: Mistral Voxtral TTS API client. Natural expressive speech in 9 languages, voice cloning, streaming, cross-lingual synthesis.

plugins.name: vrr-efa-api
plugins.description: VRR (Verkehrsverbund Rhein-Ruhr) live transit API client. German regional transit lookups -- departures, connections, stops. No API key.

plugins.name: web-design
plugins.description: Build distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Websites, landing pages, dashboards, web apps.
